_comment: Add your personal Hanoi favorites here. Schema matches the shops table.
_comment_2: Fields: name (required), name_vi, lat, lng, address, price_level (1-4), tags[], phone, source_url
_comment_3: The seed script will upsert these via google_place_id (if looked up) or (lat,lng,name) otherwise.
_comment_4: Example entry below — delete this object and add your real shops.
